changes: Fix: the “Geminize this” menu was missing on the feed in standard Chrome — it now shows on video links everywhere again, plus on the watch page itself.
“Esporta tutto”: back up all your prompts to a single JSON file (and restore them with Importa), since prompts are local and are lost if the extension is uninstalled.
“Geminize this” now also works directly on the video page: right-click anywhere on a watch page, not just on links in the feed.
Refreshed, Bitwarden-inspired interface (cards, accent buttons, selectable prompt rows).
Per-prompt export: each prompt can be downloaded as a single JSON file to share.
Import is now a setting-wide action in the options footer.
Version link in the popup that opens this changelog.
First stable release with a local prompt archive (create, edit, delete prompts).
Context-menu submenu “Geminize this” listing all saved prompts, default on top.
{{url}} placeholder to position the video URL anywhere in a prompt.
Options page for full management and a toolbar popup to switch the default.
Import / export prompts as JSON with an author field for sharing.
Initial release: right-click a YouTube link and send it to Gemini with a pre-filled summary prompt.
